description: Towering stone and thin air where the world falls away beneath you and the weather turns without mercy.
biomes: Mesa
A flat-topped rise of red stone standing alone above the surrounding land. The edges drop sharply into empty air.
Volcanic
Dark rock and sulfur vents where the mountain still breathes. The ground is warm and the air tastes of ash.
Highland
Exposed ridges above the treeline where the wind is constant and the views stretch across entire kingdoms.
Pass
A narrow path between peaks where snow drifts deep and the walls of stone funnel the wind into a howl.
Peak
The top of the world, where the air is thin and the clouds roll below you like a second sea.
Slopes
Loose stone and scrubby grass angling sharply upward. Every step sends small rocks tumbling into the distance below.
Ridge
A spine of exposed rock with steep drops on both sides. The path is barely wide enough to walk single file.
Crater
A vast bowl scooped from the mountain's summit. The walls are steep and the floor holds secrets the sky cannot see.
Alpine Meadow
A high green clearing surrounded by snow-capped peaks. Wildflowers bloom briefly in the short summer, vivid against the grey stone.
Rockslide
A slope of loose boulders and shattered stone. Nothing is stable, and the mountain seems eager to keep sliding.
